title: Raccoon Removal in Bethpage, NY | $900–$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Bethpage, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion, and cleanup. Licensed experts serving Bethpage homes and businesses. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Bethpage, NY, where suburban neighborhoods and wooded areas provide ideal habitat for these clever nocturnal animals. From attics in homes near Bethpage State Park to commercial properties along Hempstead Turnpike, raccoons can cause extensive damage and pose health risks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive, humane raccoon removal services throughout Bethpage and surrounding Long Island communities.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife management experience to Bethpage residents, with certified technicians who understand the unique challenges of Long Island's raccoon populations. We offer same-day emergency service, humane exclusion methods, complete sanitation and repairs, and warranty-backed solutions that keep raccoons out for good.
localContext: Bethpage's mix of mid-century residential homes, the historic Bethpage Black Course area, and proximity to wooded parks creates numerous entry points for raccoons seeking shelter. Our team is familiar with the construction styles common in Bethpage neighborhoods, from post-war Cape Cods to split-level homes, and knows exactly where raccoons typically gain access to attics, crawlspaces, and chimneys.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Bethpage?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Bethpage typically ranges from $900 to $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, accessibility of the affected area, and extent of damage repair needed. A single raccoon in an easily accessible attic may cost around $900–$1,500, while a family of raccoons requiring extensive exclusion work, cleanup, and structural repairs can reach $3,000–$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Bethpage neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Bethpage due to the area's suburban setting with mature trees, proximity to Bethpage State Park, and abundant food sources from garbage and pet food. They frequently den in attics, chimneys, and crawlspaces, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring. The older housing stock in many Bethpage neighborhoods can have vulnerable entry points that raccoons easily exploit.

faqs.question: Is raccoon removal in Bethpage humane and legal?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Best Pest Control NYC follows all New York State Department of Environmental Conservation regulations for humane wildlife removal. We use live trapping methods and exclusion techniques that allow raccoons to leave but not re-enter. Our technicians are licensed and trained in ethical wildlife management practices, ensuring raccoons are handled safely and in compliance with all local Bethpage and Nassau County ordinances.

faqs.question: What damage can raccoons cause to Bethpage homes?
faqs.answer: Raccoons can cause significant damage to Bethpage homes, including torn insulation, chewed electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), damaged roof vents and soffits, contaminated attics from feces and urine, and destroyed ductwork. They're strong enough to rip open roof shingles and fascia boards to gain entry. Their waste can also harbor parasites and diseases like raccoon roundworm, making professional cleanup essential for your family's health and safety.
